violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) was observed with food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Proper slicer cleaning reviewed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

The presence of (pest) is not controlled as evidenced by (ants) in dry storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment shall contact pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

The floors throughout the facility have a food residue and/or debris underneath/in the following areas: -3-bay sink -dry storage -stove -prep line -W/I cooler The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

The floors in the (bar & kitchen) area is in poor repair. Observed tiles missing/cracked and grout missing on behind bar, in front of stove, and prep line. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
